items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for service contract integration.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Service contract integration (parts covered)' requirement, but the evidence does not provide concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case mentions service contract integration, there is no direct evidence showing that the system effectively integrates service contracts to cover parts. Therefore, the validation cannot be conclusively determined based on the available evidence.
